warehouses.emptyDescription: Create your first warehouse to start organizing inventory

warehouses.visual.title: Warehouse map
warehouses.visual.description: Locate racks, inspect the side detail, and switch back to the classic view whenever needed.
warehouses.visual.emptyDescription: Create a warehouse to enable the visual view.
warehouses.visual.assignmentDescription: {count} racks in this warehouse. Auto-assignment does not modify data; it only changes the map reading.
warehouses.visual.autoAssignDescription: Assign the remaining racks to the blueprint using their current order.
warehouses.visual.autoAssignNotice: {count} racks were auto-assigned by order. If the layout does not match the real warehouse, disable this helper to return to strict name mapping.
warehouses.visual.overflowNotice: There are {count} racks outside the base blueprint. They are shown in the extra zone so they stay visible on the map.
warehouses.visual.materialLocated: Material located. Rack and shelf are highlighted on the map.
warehouses.visual.emptyMapHint: The blueprint is ready. If you name your racks like Rack A, Rack B, Rack C, Rack D, Rack F, Rack AUX, or Rack AXU, they will snap directly into the map. If you prefer a looser interpretation, enable auto-assignment by order.
warehouses.visual.aerialDescription: Select a rack or search for a material to locate it.
warehouses.visual.layoutEditorDescriptio: Move racks in the aerial view, rotate them, add a new rack, or remove the selected rack.
warehouses.visual.resetLayoutConfirm: Reset this warehouse visual layout to the new vertical plan?
warehouses.visual.deleteRackConfirm: Delete rack {name}? This also deletes its shelves and stock records.
warehouses.visual.mappingOverflow: Rack outside the base blueprint, shown in the extra zone
warehouses.visual.autoRackNotice: This rack was auto-assigned by order. If it does not match, disable that helper.
warehouses.visual.overflowRackNotice: This rack does not match the base blueprint and is displayed as an extra rack.
warehouses.visual.inferredShelves: {count} shelves use inferred positions based on the current order.
warehouses.visual.selectShelf: Select a shelf to view materials.
warehouses.visual.inferredPositionNotice: This shelf position was inferred by order. For a more exact placement, name the shelf with level and side, for example: "Level 4 Left" or "Shelf 2 Right".
